observations.summary: The image of threads draped over brittle bones with maggots working the rotted cloth parallels earlier descriptions of decaying textiles and brittle bones symbolizing death and the surrender of vitality.

source_evidence.quote: Now those threads draped over brittle bones. Maggots worked the rotted cloth in the near dark, pale as mushroom flesh, fat as thumbs.

target_evidence.quote: Rotting textiles, Mother Zuna's sacred threads left mid-shuttle, had unraveled into mildew and waste: a promise broken not by time, but by overwhelming, internal density. The decaying fabrics sloughed off the looms, draping over discarded, brittle animal bones, making a horrifyingly dry rustle: the sound of all vitality surrendering to the material.

accepted_observations.summary: The image of threads draped over brittle bones with maggots working the rotted cloth parallels earlier descriptions of decaying textiles and brittle bones symbolizing death and the surrender of vitality.
